case_title: PATEL, ROGER N. vs. ER, AYDIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, ROGER N. AS TO DEFENDANT ER, AYDIN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ER, AYDIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1541 CALIFORNIA STREET #39, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF VACATED ON OR BEFORE 30 NOV 99, PLNTF SHALL WAIVE ANY AND ALL PAST DUE RENT AND STIPULATE TO VACATE THIS JUDGMENT WITH PREJUDICE.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ER, AYDIN

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 414, GRAGAN, JUDGE; PYEN, CLERK; ARAMSEY, CSR. PLNTF ROGER N PATEL APPR IN PRO PER WITH DANIEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING. DEF AYDIN ER APPR IN PRO PER. ARGUED AND THE COURT FINDS FOR THE PLNTF ROGER N. PATEL AND AGAINST DEF AYDIN ER AND AWARDS PLNTF POSSESSION OF 1541 CALIFORNIA STREET #39, SAN FRANCISCO, CA TOGETHER WITH DAMAGES OF $800.00 AND FORFEIT OF $150 SECURITY DEPOSIT. EVICTION STAYED TO 30 NOV 99. IF VACATED ON OR BEFORE, $800 WAIVED.
